# Vendored Mist Subset

This directory contains a small vendored subset of the [Mist](https://github.com/thatstoasty/mist) Mojo package.

Only the `mist.termios` files needed for POSIX terminal handling are included. The full Mist project is an ANSI-aware terminal toolkit for styling text, controlling terminal behavior, and reading terminal events.

Mist is created by Mikhail Tavarez and is licensed under the MIT License. See `LICENSE` in this directory for the copied license text.
